hero.title: Natural Wellness Inspired By Nature
hero.subtitle: Discover Spinexa Herbal Wellness Oil designed for your everyday comfort routine.

problem.title: Your Body Deserves Better Care
problem.p1: Modern life pulls your body in every direction. Hours at a desk. Workouts that push limits. Evenings that never quite switch off. The tension builds quietly — in your shoulders, your back, your everyday comfort.
problem.p2: You deserve more than quick fixes and synthetic shortcuts. You deserve care that understands the way your body moves through the day — natural, intentional, and made to fit seamlessly into your routine.

benefits.title: Care That Works With Your Body
benefits.subtitle: Every detail — from ingredient to bottle — is designed to deliver a wellness experience you can feel.
benefits.herbal_formula_desc: Cold-pressed botanical extracts, crafted with traditional herbal wisdom and modern precision.
benefits.relaxing_desc: A calming aromatic ritual that helps you unwind, release tension, and find your moment of calm.
benefits.everyday_desc: Designed for daily use — a simple, versatile addition to your morning and evening routine.
benefits.premium_desc: Meticulously sourced ingredients and premium packaging you will be proud to display.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Three simple steps that turn any moment into a wellness ritual.
how_it_works.step_1_desc: Dispense a small amount of Spinexa Oil onto the area that needs care.
how_it_works.step_2_desc: Gently massage in circular motions for 1–2 minutes until lightly absorbed.
how_it_works.step_3_desc: Let the botanical blend work while you breathe in the calming aroma.

ingredients.title: Ingredients Inspired By Nature
ingredients.subtitle: Every drop of Spinexa is built from cold-pressed botanicals chosen for their soothing, comforting properties — never synthetic fragrances, never parabens.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Spinexa. Can't find an answer? Our care team is one message away.
faq.still_have_questions_text: Our care team is ready to help.
